name_cn:
WALLET ON CHAIN IVY Handbag #️⃣M81911
Exclusive global launch! Customized according to boutique craftsmanship, dynamic chip code change, original boutique fabric, original boutique light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color consistent with authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive authentic original fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest complete gift box!
23.5 x 12 x 4.3 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Aged cowhide trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Card slot
Patch pocket
Zip pocket
Main compartment
Magnetic snap closure
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 22.5 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 44.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 18.5 cm
Made in France
